name: Mad Day 2 Special
description: Ride, shoot, jump and smash your way to victory in this addictive runner. Team up with ex-Marine Bob to battle evil aliens who have invaded the planet. To make things even worse, they’ve kidnapped his beloved pet octopus. Needless to say that Bob is on a mission to make this an encounter that the aliens won’t soon forget!
instructions: space - jump double space - double jump x arrow up - rockets
